write: SELECT * FROM x
SELECT *, a + 1 FROM x
SELECT *, a + 1 AS x FROM x
SELECT *, a + 1 FROM x
SELECT *, a + 1 AS x, b FROM x

transpile.sql: from x derive {x = a + 1, b} select {y = x, 2}

write: SELECT a + 1 AS y, 2 FROM x
SELECT * FROM x LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM x LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM x WHERE age > 25

transpile.sql: from x derive {x = a + 1, b} filter age > 25

write: SELECT *, a + 1 AS x, b FROM x WHERE age > 25
SELECT * FROM x WHERE dept <> 'IT'

transpile.sql: from x filter p == 'product' select { a, b }

write: SELECT a, b FROM x WHERE p = 'product'

transpile.sql: from x filter age > 25 filter age < 27

write: SELECT * FROM x WHERE age > 25 AND age < 27
SELECT * FROM x WHERE (age > 25 AND age < 27)
SELECT * FROM x WHERE (age > 25 OR age < 27)

transpile.sql: from x filter (age > 25 || age < 22) filter age > 26 filter age < 27

write: SELECT * FROM x WHERE ((age > 25 OR age < 22) AND age > 26) AND age < 27
SELECT * FROM x ORDER BY age
SELECT * FROM x ORDER BY age DESC
SELECT * FROM x ORDER BY age, name
SELECT * FROM x ORDER BY age DESC, name
SELECT * FROM x UNION ALL SELECT * FROM y
SELECT * FROM x EXCEPT ALL SELECT * FROM y
SELECT * FROM x INTERSECT ALL SELECT * FROM y

transpile.sql: from x filter a == null filter null != b

write: SELECT * FROM x WHERE a IS NULL AND NOT b IS NULL

transpile.sql: from x filter (a > 1 || null != b || c != null)

write: SELECT * FROM x WHERE (a > 1 OR NOT b IS NULL OR NOT c IS NULL)
SELECT AVG(x) FROM a

transpile.sql: from a aggregate { average x, min y, ct = sum z }

write: SELECT AVG(x), MIN(y), COALESCE(SUM(z), 0) AS ct FROM a

transpile.sql: from a aggregate { average x, min y, sum z }

write: SELECT AVG(x), MIN(y), COALESCE(SUM(z), 0) FROM a

transpile.sql: from a aggregate { min y, b = stddev x, max z }

write: SELECT MIN(y), STDDEV(x) AS b, MAX(z) FROM a
